title: How to Set Up Trailing Stop Loss on Tradingview, Can you fix Trailing SL Button Not Showing 2026
description:
In this detailed 2026 guide, you’ll learn how to set up a Trailing Stop Loss on TradingView and what to do if the Trailing SL button is not showing on your chart. Trailing Stop Loss is one of the most powerful trading tools that helps lock in profits while letting your winning trades run. This tutorial walks you through the correct way to use and enable trailing stops directly on TradingView’s integrated broker panel or connected accounts like OANDA, FXCM, and other supported brokers.

We’ll start by explaining how trailing stop loss works, then move to the TradingView order panel, showing how to enable and adjust the trailing distance in pips or percentages. If you can’t see the trailing stop button, I’ll show you why — including reasons like using a demo account, unsupported broker, or inactive order type — and how to fix it by adjusting your order preferences or connecting a broker that supports trailing stops.

By the end, you’ll fully understand how to activate, modify, and monitor a trailing stop loss on both desktop and mobile TradingView apps, plus a few pro tips to use it safely without premature exits during volatile price movements.

Timestamps:
00:00 – Intro & what is a Trailing Stop Loss
00:40 – Open TradingView order panel & locate the trailing SL feature
01:15 – Set distance and activate trailing stop loss
01:50 – Fix Trailing SL button not showing (common causes & solutions)
02:30 – Final tips for managing trades with trailing SL

title: How to Issue a Refund on Ebay 2026, Refund as a Seller Easily
description:
In this video, I have shown how to issue a refund on eBay in 2026 as a seller — whether it's due to a return request, item not received, or buyer dissatisfaction. This guide walks you through the exact steps to process a full or partial refund, directly from your eBay Seller Hub or via the resolution center.

You'll learn how to access recent orders, open refund options, and choose between manual refunds or letting eBay handle it automatically if a return is approved. I also explain how to check refund status, how long it takes to process, and what happens with your PayPal or connected payout account.

This tutorial is important for maintaining a healthy seller rating, avoiding disputes, and delivering a better customer experience. I also cover refund policies, when not to issue a refund, and how to handle fraudulent claims smartly.

Watch till the end for bonus tips on reducing refund rates, updating item descriptions properly, and automating policies for faster resolution.
